jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Cars24 - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
